retry_reason: kref_get always succeeds; there is no failure path to retry.
contract_summary: Get wrapper: acquires an additional reference on an rbd_client by incrementing its kref refcount via kref_get. The caller receives back the same pointer (rbdc) with an extra reference. The caller must pair this call with a corresponding kref_put (or similar release) when done with the reference to avoid leaking the object. This operation is unconditional and always succeeds.

judge.reason: The function exclusively calls kref_get and returns the same pointer; no other logic is present.
